findings.finding: IIT KGP competition winner uses Kurtosis + Kaufman Efficiency Ratio (KER) to detect regime, then routes to mean-reversion vs trend-following signal sets. Achieved Sharpe 2.276 on out-of-sample.
findings.relevance_to_us: HIGH - Our signal engine applies all signals uniformly regardless of regime. Regime-blind application is likely why XAG accuracy is near random (49.4%). Routing signals by regime could dramatically improve hit rate.
findings.source: IIT KGP quantitative competition paper, regime-adaptive routing via kurtosis/KER classification

findings.finding: Rolling 7-day accuracy used to dynamically weight signal contributions in ensemble. Signals that have been accurate recently get higher weight, degraded signals get suppressed automatically without manual disable/enable.
findings.relevance_to_us: HIGH - We currently use static equal weighting with manual disable list. Walk-forward reweighting would auto-suppress degraded signals like qwen3 (45.2%) and boost strong performers like drift_regime_gate (68.1% recent).
findings.source: Ensemble signal weighting literature, rolling accuracy-based reweighting

findings.finding: Position size = Risk Budget / (ATR * multiplier). Normalizes position sizes by current volatility. Standard approach: 1-2% risk per trade, ATR(14) with 2x multiplier for stop distance.
findings.relevance_to_us: HIGH - We use fixed position sizes regardless of volatility. ATR-based sizing would reduce exposure during high-vol regimes and increase during calm periods. Already have ATR computed in signal pipeline.
findings.source: Standard quantitative risk management, ATR position sizing methodology

findings.finding: Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT) analysis shows gold price is the #1 cross-asset predictor of BTC, followed by DXY. Correlation regime between gold-BTC shifts between 0.4-0.6 and is itself predictive of BTC direction.
findings.relevance_to_us: MEDIUM - We track gold and BTC independently but don't use gold as a BTC predictor. Adding gold-BTC correlation regime signal could improve BTC consensus. DXY already tracked via credit_spread_risk.
findings.source: TFT cross-asset feature importance analysis for BTC prediction

findings.finding: mRMR (minimum Redundancy Maximum Relevance) feature selection identifies signals that are highly predictive but minimally correlated with each other. Removes redundant signals that dilute consensus without adding information.
findings.relevance_to_us: HIGH - We have 16 active signals, some likely correlated (e.g., RSI and mean_reversion both use RSI variants). Pruning redundant signals would sharpen consensus and reduce HOLD dilution.
findings.source: mRMR feature selection methodology for signal ensemble optimization

findings.finding: CFTC COT data shows Managed Money net long 5472 contracts in silver. ETF inflows rate-of-change and COT positioning changes are leading indicators for silver price moves. Industrial demand proxies (copper, solar ETF) add predictive power.
findings.relevance_to_us: HIGH - Our COT signal has only 5 samples and 100% accuracy (unreliable small sample). Silver ETF flows not tracked at all. Adding COT change momentum and ETF flow signals could materially improve XAG accuracy from 49.4%.
findings.source: CFTC COT reports, silver ETF flow analysis, industrial demand correlation studies

recommended_improvements.title: Walk-forward accuracy signal reweighting
recommended_improvements.description: Replace static equal weighting with rolling 7-day accuracy-based weights. Signals with higher recent accuracy get proportionally more influence in consensus.

recommended_improvements.title: Disable degraded signals qwen3/crypto_macro/econ_calendar
recommended_improvements.description: Qwen3 at 45.2%, crypto_macro and econ_calendar underperforming. Disable globally, re-enable only for tickers where per-ticker accuracy exceeds threshold.

recommended_improvements.title: Enable high-accuracy disabled signals adx/amihud/choppiness
recommended_improvements.description: Several disabled signals show strong backtested accuracy. ADX trend filter, Amihud illiquidity, and choppiness index could improve regime detection without adding noise.

recommended_improvements.title: Regime-conditional signal routing
recommended_improvements.description: Implement KER/kurtosis regime detection to route mean-reversion signals in ranging markets and trend signals in trending markets. Based on IIT KGP competition winner approach.
